◎简　　介  

　　At a Keralite Christian wedding, a young man in the audience watches mournfully as the woman of his dreams walks down the aisle. Flashback, a young wannabe filmmaker Kartik (Simbu) moves in to the lower floor of a Keralite family, whose daughter Jessie (Trisha) he instantly falls in love with.
